paragraphs.text: Set on the banks of the Allegheny River, the Lawrence Center is a LEED-certified, light-filled venue with 313,000 sq ft of contiguous exhibit space — purpose-built for technical conferences like ours.

1000 Fort Duquesne Boulevard
          Pittsburgh, PA 15222
          United States

T · Blue Line
          T · Red Line
Exit at Steel Plaza or Wood Street stations. Both stops are within a 6-minute walk of the convention center's south entrance.
A flat 12-minute walk along the Strip District corridor, or a 4-minute ride on the T-Blue. Wayfinding signage will be posted October 8–11.
We've secured discounted rates at three partner hotels within a 10-minute walk of the venue. Use the booking codes below before September 12, 2025 to lock in the conference rate.
Rates include in-room Wi-Fi. State and occupancy taxes additional. Standard cancellation policies apply per hotel.
The conference occupies the east wing of Level 3. Halls A and B host all sessions and workshops; the Expo Floor (Level 2) houses hardware vendors and the Ironclad Lounge.

The attached underground garage offers 700 spaces with direct elevator access to Level 1 (Registration).
      Daily rate: $22 flat with conference validation at the registration desk.
      Standard non-validated rate is $32/day. EV chargers (J1772 and CCS) are available on levels P2 and P3 on a first-come basis.
      Overflow parking at the Grant Street Garage (5-minute walk) runs $18/day.
Dedicated 10 Gbps backbone with conference SSID ironclad-2025. No password — captive portal acceptance only.
All session halls are step-free and ADA-compliant. Live captioning is provided in Hall A. Quiet room available on Level 3.
Catered breakfast, lunch, and afternoon espresso bar included with every badge. Dietary options labeled at each station.
Two days of systems engineering, infrastructure, and hardware — Pittsburgh, PA.
